title: Stelis ramiro-medinae
taxonomy: Stelis ramiro-medinae is a species of orchid in the genus Stelis. It is classified under the family Orchidaceae. This species is further categorized as being part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. The Stelis genus is part of the tribe Epidendreae. Classification of Stelis ramiro-medinae continues to evolve based on ongoing taxonomic research.
